# Quaternius Universal Animation Libraries

- UAL1: https://quaternius.com/packs/universalanimationlibrary.html
- UAL2: https://quaternius.com/packs/universalanimationlibrary2.html
- Imported files: `UAL1_Standard.fbx`, `UAL2_Standard.fbx`
- License: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain Dedication

UAL1 supplies base locomotion. UAL2 supplies additional idle, climbing, hiding, and pose-oriented clips. The bundled `LICENSE.txt` is the upstream license text.
